name: Data Sentinel
description: Deep second-pass scan for sensitive data that slipped through initial PII scrubbing. Detects JWT tokens, API keys, private keys, connection strings, internal IPs/hostnames, medical records, crypto wallets, encoded blobs, and more. Pay-per-request via x402.
capabilities: Detect leaked credentials (JWT, API keys, private keys, connection strings)
Detect financial identifiers (IBAN, SWIFT/BIC, crypto wallets)
Detect personal identifiers (passport, DOB, medical records, drivers license)
Detect internal infrastructure leaks (private IPs, hostnames, file paths)
